entries.definition:
s–l–l to extract gently and unobtrusively, to pull out strands of wool; pedigree, breed; to move about stealthily. Of this root, two forms occur three times in the Qurʾan: يتسللون yatasallalūn once and سلالة sulālatun twice.
يتسلّلون yatasallalūn [imperf. of v. V, intrans.] to steal away, to move about stealthily (24:63) قَدْ يَعْلَمُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ يَتَسَلَّلُونَ مِنكُمْ لِوَاذًا God is well aware of those of you who steal away surreptitiously.

سُلَالَة sulālatun [n.] extract, essence, strain, stock (23:12) وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مِن سُلَـٰلَةٍ مِّن طِينٍ indeed, We created man from a stock of clay.
entries.definition_english:
s–l–l to extract gently and unobtrusively, to pull out strands of wool; pedigree, breed; to move about stealthily. Of this root, two forms occur three times in the Qurʾan: يتسللون yatasallalūn once and سلالة sulālatun twice.
يتسلّلون yatasallalūn [imperf. of v. V, intrans.] to steal away, to move about stealthily (24:63) قَدْ يَعْلَمُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ يَتَسَلَّلُونَ مِنكُمْ لِوَاذًا God is well aware of those of you who steal away surreptitiously.

سُلَالَة sulālatun [n.] extract, essence, strain, stock (23:12) وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مِن سُلَـٰلَةٍ مِّن طِينٍ indeed, We created man from a stock of clay.
